title: La Chaux-de-Fonds, Neuchâtel — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to La Chaux-de-Fonds, Neuchâtel: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

La Chaux-de-Fonds is a city in Neuchâtel with a population of 37,000. A UNESCO World Heritage city in the Jura Mountains, the global capital of watchmaking with a unique grid-like urban plan and rich horological history.

Last updated: July 21, 2026
